basic_details.job_title: DRDO ITR Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 27 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Integrated Test Range (DRDO ITR) Recruitment 2026: Integrated Test Range has released the official notification for 27 Paid Internship posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned for this internship.

qualification.education_qualification: Final Year BTech/MTech in Engineering disciplines, Final Year M.Sc. in Physics
qualification.details: Final Year of BTech / MTech or Final Year M.Sc. in Electronics Engg/ECE, Electrical Engg., Comp. Sc. Engg., Mechanical Engg., Aero Space Engg., Physics.

selection_process: Merit based or Interaction over VC/Telephone
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: drdo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DRDO ITR Paid Internship Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO ITR Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DRDO ITR Paid Internship is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the stipend offered for the Paid Internship at DRDO ITR?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Paid Internship at DRDO ITR will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000/- per month during their internship period.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates must be in their final year of B.Tech/M.Tech in various engineering disciplines or in their final year of M.Sc. in Physics to be eligible for this internship.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the DRDO ITR Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this internship?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for the DRDO ITR Paid Internship.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: Integrated Test Range (DRDO ITR) has announced a total of 27 vacancies for the Paid Internship posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the DRDO ITR Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on merit or through an interaction conducted over VC/Telephone, as decided by the organization.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Integrated Test Range (DRDO ITR) located?
faq.answer: The Integrated Test Range (DRDO ITR) is located in Chandipur, Odisha, with the pincode 756025.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this internship?
faq.answer: The Paid Internship at DRDO ITR is a contractual position, meaning it is for a fixed duration.

faq.question: Q10. When will the internship training commence?
faq.answer: The internship training is scheduled to commence on 20th July 2026 for the selected candidates.
